TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ë´ãÂà•Ë™™‰∏çamana sakamu tu kai' amana ka kai sa, mahida siwacaahay ku lahud, amica kapah tu sakaku,mahida mialaay tu tuud, sawni maala sawni malawpes, caay ka patay ku dimiad, amana pikai tunipiawda nu maku, amana' pikaisa a malalitemuh. nu maudipay, pinakiya haw ku saka lalitemuh, sakay udip, pina ku kapahay a cabay,alahican malalitemuh, lalitemuh saca, caay ka tadikud, pasayda han tu taayaw. .
S.PHON: ****amana sakamu tu kai î~ ° amana ka kai sa, maƒßida siwa ¶aaƒßaj ku r~…æaƒßud, ami ¶a kapaƒß tu sakaku,maƒßida miar~…æaaj tu tuud, sawni maar~…æa sawni mar~…æawp…ôs, ¶aaj ka pataj ku dimiad, amana pikai tunipiawda nu maku, amana î~ ° pikaisa a mar~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß. nu maudipaj, pinakija ƒßaw ku saka r~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß, sakaj udip, pina ku kapaƒßaj a ¶abaj,ar~…æaƒßi ¶an mar~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß, r~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß sa ¶a, ¶aaj ka tadikud, pasajda ƒßan tu taajaw. .
S.FORM: Ë´ãÂà•Ë™™‰∏çamana sakamu tu kai' amana ka kai sa, mahida siwacaahay ku lahud, amica kapah tu sakaku,mahida mialaay tu tuud, sawni maala sawni malawpes, caay ka patay ku dimiad, amana pikai tunipiawda nu maku, amana' pikaisa a malalitemuh. nu maudipay, pinakiya haw ku saka lalitemuh, sakay udip, pina ku kapahay a cabay,alahican malalitemuh, lalitemuh saca, caay ka tadikud, pasayda han tu taayaw. .
